recommendations.title: Squared Love
recommendations.overview: A celebrity journalist and renowned womanizer starts to rethink his life choices after he falls for a mysterious model who leads a double life.

recommendations.title: Eddie Murphy Raw
recommendations.overview: Eddie Murphy delights, shocks and entertains with dead-on celebrity impersonations, observations on '80s love, sex and marriage, a remembrance of Mom's hamburgers and much more.

recommendations.title: Popstar: Never Stop Never Stopping
recommendations.overview: When his new album fails to sell records, pop/rap superstar Conner4real goes into a major tailspin and watches his celebrity high life begin to collapse. He'll try anything to bounce back, anything except reuniting with his old rap group The Style Bo

recommendations.title: InAPPropriate Comedy
recommendations.overview: A no-nonsense cop has a flair for fashion and a celebrity takes revenge on the paparazzi in a collection of comedic sketches.

recommendations.title: #realityhigh
recommendations.overview: When nerdy high schooler Dani finally attracts the interest of her longtime crush, she lands in the cross hairs of his ex, a social media celebrity.

recommendations.title: The Man Without Gravity
recommendations.overview: A gravity-defying boy raised in seclusion matures into an extraordinary man -- and an international celebrity -- who longs for human connection.

recommendations.title: S.F.W.
recommendations.overview: An alienated and misanthropic teenager gains sudden and unwanted celebrity status after he's taken hostage by terrorists where his indifference to their threats to kill him makes news headlines.

recommendations.title: Them Who?
recommendations.overview: David loses his white collar job, his fiancée and his house after one night with con man Marcello. He tracks him down to exact revenge, but ends up becoming his disciple in order to win back everything.

recommendations.title: Boundin'
recommendations.overview: On a high mountain plain lives a lamb with wool of such remarkable sheen that he breaks into high-steppin' dance. But there comes a day when he loses his lustrous coat and, along with it, his pride. It takes a wise jackalope - a horn-adorned rabbit -

recommendations.title: Queens on the Run
recommendations.overview: When four women finally take the road trip they planned in high school, they have no idea of the things they'll bump into... sometimes literally.
